breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome silently drops 'gravitational shielding' claim — but the retreat kills his own coupling constant
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-012 detail_evidence rewrite (EXP-192) documents that the dome's live WIN-011 now explicitly labels the mechanism 'CONFIRMED (Mechanism Contested)' and cites Unnikrishnan 2001 as ruling out gravitational shielding. The dome retreats to a 'thermal-tilt loophole' — but this kills kappa (the magnetic-gravity coupling constant) because an instrument-artifact denominator is not a gravity measurement. The dome's WIN-011 concession and WIN-012's unchanged use of -6.5 uGal are mutually exclusive on the same live site today.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Dome author making substantive concessions under pressure; those concessions create new self-contradictions. This is a genuine quality-of-science moment worth highlighting.
